name: my-next-breath
description: Jeremy Renner's memoir of surviving a near-fatal snowcat accident — the power of action, the will to recover, family as fuel, and finding meaning after catastrophic trauma.
useCase: Surviving catastrophic trauma, finding strength to recover, taking decisive action in crisis, using love as fuel, rebuilding after everything changes.
knownRisks: Renner is not a professional writer — the prose is raw and unpolished by design
Some details of the accident and recovery are graphic and may be triggering
The book was written relatively soon after the incident (2024) — longer-term perspective may evolve
This is a personal memoir, not a medical or psychological guide
